Barbarian.name: Rage
Barbarian.description: Enter a primal state granting damage resistance, bonus damage on Strength attacks, advantage on Strength checks/saves.

Barbarian.name: Unarmored Defense
Barbarian.description: When not wearing armor, AC equals 10 plus Dexterity and Constitution modifiers.

Barbarian.name: Weapon Mastery
Barbarian.description: Use mastery properties of two chosen melee weapons.

Barbarian.name: Danger Sense
Barbarian.description: Gain advantage on Dexterity saving throws unless incapacitated.

Barbarian.name: Reckless Attack
Barbarian.description: Attack with advantage on Strength rolls, but enemies gain advantage against you until your next turn.

Barbarian.name: Barbarian Subclass
Barbarian.description: Choose a subclass specialization.

Barbarian.name: Primal Knowledge
Barbarian.description: Gain an additional skill proficiency and can use Strength for certain skills while raging.

Barbarian.name: Ability Score Improvement
Barbarian.description: Gain an ability score increase or feat. Received again at levels 8, 12, and 16.

Barbarian.name: Extra Attack
Barbarian.description: Attack twice instead of once when taking the Attack action.

Barbarian.name: Fast Movement
Barbarian.description: Speed increases by 10 feet while not wearing heavy armor.

Barbarian.name: Feral Instinct
Barbarian.description: Gain advantage on initiative rolls.

Barbarian.name: Instinctive Pounce
Barbarian.description: Move up to half your speed as part of the bonus action used to enter rage.

Barbarian.name: Brutal Strike
Barbarian.description: When using Reckless Attack, forgo advantage to add 1d10 damage with special effects.

Barbarian.name: Relentless Rage
Barbarian.description: When dropping to 0 HP while raging, make a Constitution save to restore HP.

Barbarian.name: Improved Brutal Strike
Barbarian.description: Unlock additional Brutal Strike effects: Staggering Blow and Sundering Blow.

Barbarian.name: Persistent Rage
Barbarian.description: Regain all rage uses when rolling initiative. Rage lasts 10 minutes.

Barbarian.name: Improved Brutal Strike (Enhanced)
Barbarian.description: Brutal Strike extra damage increases to 2d10, apply two effects simultaneously.

Barbarian.name: Indomitable Might
Barbarian.description: On Strength checks or saves, use your Strength score if higher than your roll.

Barbarian.name: Epic Boon
Barbarian.description: Gain an Epic Boon feat or another qualifying feat.

Barbarian.name: Primal Champion
Barbarian.description: Strength and Constitution scores increase by 4, to a maximum of 25.

Barbarian.name: Frenzy
Barbarian.description: While using Reckless Attack during rage, deal extra damage on the first target hit.

Barbarian.name: Mindless Rage
Barbarian.description: Gain immunity to charmed and frightened conditions while raging.

Barbarian.name: Retaliation
Barbarian.description: When damaged by a creature within 5 feet, use reaction to make one melee attack.

Barbarian.name: Intimidating Presence
Barbarian.description: Use bonus action to frighten creatures in a 30-foot radius.

Bard.name: Bardic Inspiration
Bard.description: Inspire creatures within 60 feet as a bonus action, granting a Bardic Inspiration die to add to a failed d20 test.

Bard.name: Spellcasting
Bard.description: Cast spells using Charisma. Know two cantrips from the Bard spell list.

Bard.name: Expertise
Bard.description: Gain expertise in two skill proficiencies. Gain two more at level 9.

Bard.name: Jack of All Trades
Bard.description: Add half your proficiency bonus to ability checks using skills you lack proficiency in.

Bard.name: Ability Score Improvement
Bard.description: Gain an ability score increase or feat. Again at levels 8, 12, and 16.

Bard.name: Font of Inspiration
Bard.description: Regain all Bardic Inspiration uses on short or long rest.

Bard.name: Countercharm
Bard.description: When you or ally within 30 feet fails a save against charmed or frightened, use reaction to reroll with advantage.

Bard.name: Magical Secrets
Bard.description: Choose prepared spells from Bard, Cleric, Druid, or Wizard spell lists.

Bard.name: Superior Inspiration
Bard.description: When rolling initiative, regain Bardic Inspiration uses until you have two.

Bard.name: Epic Boon
Bard.description: Gain an Epic Boon feat or another qualifying feat.

Bard.name: Words of Creation
Bard.description: Always have Power Word Heal and Power Word Kill prepared.

Bard.name: Bonus Proficiencies
Bard.description: College of Lore: Gain proficiency with three skills.

Bard.name: Cutting Words
Bard.description: College of Lore: Expend Bardic Inspiration as reaction to subtract die from creature's roll.

Bard.name: Magical Discoveries
Bard.description: College of Lore: Learn two spells from Cleric, Druid, or Wizard lists.

Bard.name: Peerless Skill
Bard.description: College of Lore: When failing ability check or attack, expend Bardic Inspiration to add the roll.

Cleric.name: Spellcasting
Cleric.description: Cast spells through prayer and meditation using Wisdom. Know three cantrips and prepare spells based on available slots.

Cleric.name: Divine Order
Cleric.description: Choose between Protector (martial weapons and heavy armor) or Thaumaturge (extra cantrip and bonus to Arcana/Religion checks).

Cleric.name: Channel Divinity
Cleric.description: Channel divine energy to fuel magical effects including Divine Spark and Turn Undead, usable twice before needing rest.

Cleric.name: Cleric Subclass
Cleric.description: Select a specialization such as Life Domain that grants additional features at specific levels.

Cleric.name: Ability Score Improvement
Cleric.description: Gain a feat or ability score increase, repeatable at levels 8, 12, and 16.

Cleric.name: Sear Undead
Cleric.description: When using Turn Undead, undead that fail suffer additional Radiant damage equal to rolled dice based on Wisdom modifier.

Cleric.name: Blessed Strikes
Cleric.description: Choose Divine Strike (1d8 extra damage once per turn) or Potent Spellcasting (add Wisdom to cantrip damage).

Cleric.name: Divine Intervention
Cleric.description: Cast any Cleric spell of level 5 or lower without using a spell slot, usable once per Long Rest.

Cleric.name: Improved Blessed Strikes
Cleric.description: Divine Strike increases to 2d8 damage, or Potent Spellcasting grants temporary hit points equal to twice Wisdom modifier.

Cleric.name: Epic Boon
Cleric.description: Gain an Epic Boon feat or another feat for which you qualify.

Cleric.name: Greater Divine Intervention
Cleric.description: When using Divine Intervention, you may cast Wish, but cannot use the feature again until finishing 2d4 Long Rests.

Cleric.name: Disciple of Life
Cleric.description: Life Domain: When healing spells restore hit points, add 2 plus the spell slot level in additional healing.

Cleric.name: Life Domain Spells
Cleric.description: Life Domain: Automatically prepare specific healing and restoration spells without counting against preparation limit.

Cleric.name: Preserve Life
Cleric.description: Life Domain: Expend Channel Divinity to restore hit points equal to five times Cleric level among bloodied creatures within 30 feet.

Cleric.name: Blessed Healer
Cleric.description: Life Domain: Regain hit points equal to 2 plus spell slot level after casting healing spells on other creatures.

Cleric.name: Supreme Healing
Cleric.description: Life Domain: Healing spells and Channel Divinity automatically roll the highest possible value for each die.

Druid.name: Spellcasting
Druid.description: Cast spells using Wisdom as your spellcasting ability, with access to cantrips and prepared spells from the Druid spell list.

Druid.name: Druidic
Druid.description: Know the secret language of Druids, always have Speak with Animals prepared, and can leave hidden messages in Druidic.

Druid.name: Primal Order
Druid.description: Choose between Magician (extra cantrip and bonus to Arcana/Nature checks) or Warden (Martial weapons and Medium armor proficiency).

Druid.name: Wild Shape
Druid.description: Transform into Beast forms as a bonus action, gaining temporary hit points and using the creature's statistics while retaining your mind.

Druid.name: Wild Companion
Druid.description: Cast Find Familiar by expending a spell slot or Wild Shape use, summoning a Fey familiar that disappears at long rest.

Druid.name: Druid Subclass
Druid.description: Gain a specialization from a Druid subclass, gaining its features at appropriate levels.

Druid.name: Ability Score Improvement
Druid.description: Gain the Ability Score Improvement feat or another qualifying feat. Repeats at levels 8, 12, and 16.

Druid.name: Wild Resurgence
Druid.description: Regain a Wild Shape use by expending a spell slot, or convert a Wild Shape use into a level 1 spell slot once per long rest.

Druid.name: Elemental Fury
Druid.description: Choose Potent Spellcasting to add Wisdom to cantrip damage, or Primal Strike to add 1d8 extra damage to weapon/beast attacks.

Druid.name: Improved Elemental Fury
Druid.description: Potent Spellcasting range increases by 300 feet, or Primal Strike extra damage becomes 2d8.

Druid.name: Beast Spells
Druid.description: While in Wild Shape form, you can cast spells except those with costly or consumable Material components.

Druid.name: Epic Boon
Druid.description: Gain an Epic Boon feat or another qualifying feat of your choice.

Druid.name: Archdruid
Druid.description: Regain one Wild Shape use when rolling Initiative if you have none, convert Wild Shape uses into spell slots, and age slowly.

Druid.name: Circle of the Land Spells
Druid.description: Circle of the Land: Choose a land type and automatically prepare bonus spells associated with that terrain.

Druid.name: Land's Aid
Druid.description: Circle of the Land: Expend a Wild Shape use to create a sphere where enemies take 2d6 necrotic damage and one ally regains 2d6 HP.

Druid.name: Natural Recovery
Druid.description: Circle of the Land: Cast one Circle spell without a slot after long rest, and recover spell slots after short rests.

Druid.name: Nature's Ward
Druid.description: Circle of the Land: Gain immunity to the Poisoned condition and resistance to damage matching your chosen land type.

Druid.name: Nature's Sanctuary
Druid.description: Circle of the Land: Create spectral trees granting you and allies half cover and your Nature's Ward resistance for up to one minute.

Fighter.name: Fighting Style
Fighter.description: Choose a Fighting Style feat that grants martial bonuses. You may swap your choice whenever you gain a Fighter level.

Fighter.name: Second Wind
Fighter.description: Use a Bonus Action to regain HP equal to 1d10 plus your Fighter level. You have 2 uses, regaining one per Short Rest.

Fighter.name: Weapon Mastery
Fighter.description: Gain mastery properties for 3 Simple or Martial weapons of your choice, changeable after each Long Rest.

Fighter.name: Action Surge
Fighter.description: Take one additional action on your turn (except Magic action). Recharges after a Short or Long Rest.

Fighter.name: Tactical Mind
Fighter.description: When failing an ability check, expend a Second Wind use to add 1d10 to the check.

Fighter.name: Fighter Subclass
Fighter.description: Choose a Fighter subclass specialization that grants additional features at specified levels.

Fighter.name: Ability Score Improvement
Fighter.description: Gain an Ability Score Improvement feat or another feat. Repeats at levels 6, 8, 12, 14, and 16.

Fighter.name: Extra Attack
Fighter.description: Attack twice instead of once when taking the Attack action on your turn.

Fighter.name: Tactical Shift
Fighter.description: When using Second Wind, move up to half your Speed without provoking Opportunity Attacks.

Fighter.name: Indomitable
Fighter.description: Reroll a failed saving throw with a bonus equal to your Fighter level. Additional uses at levels 13 and 17.

Fighter.name: Tactical Master
Fighter.description: Replace a weapon's mastery property with Push, Sap, or Slow for individual attacks.

Fighter.name: Two Extra Attacks
Fighter.description: Attack three times instead of once when taking the Attack action on your turn.

Fighter.name: Studied Attacks
Fighter.description: Gain Advantage on your next attack against a creature you missed since your last turn.

Fighter.name: Epic Boon
Fighter.description: Gain an Epic Boon feat or another feat of your choice for which you meet the requirements.

Fighter.name: Three Extra Attacks
Fighter.description: Attack four times instead of once when taking the Attack action on your turn.

Fighter.name: Improved Critical
Fighter.description: Champion: Weapon and Unarmed Strike attacks score Critical Hits on a roll of 19 or 20.

Fighter.name: Remarkable Athlete
Fighter.description: Champion: Gain Advantage on Initiative rolls and Strength (Athletics) checks. Move half your Speed after Critical Hits.

Fighter.name: Additional Fighting Style
Fighter.description: Champion: Gain a second Fighting Style feat of your choice.

Fighter.name: Heroic Warrior
Fighter.description: Champion: Grant yourself Heroic Inspiration at the start of each combat turn if you lack it.

Fighter.name: Superior Critical
Fighter.description: Champion: Weapon and Unarmed Strike attacks score Critical Hits on a roll of 18-20.

Fighter.name: Survivor
Fighter.description: Champion: Advantage on Death Saves, treat 18-20 as 20. Regain HP at turn start if Bloodied.

Monk.name: Martial Arts
Monk.description: Gain mastery of unarmed strikes and monk weapons with bonus unarmed strikes, a martial arts die, and Dexterity for attacks.

Monk.name: Unarmored Defense
Monk.description: When unarmored, your AC equals 10 plus your Dexterity and Wisdom modifiers.

Monk.name: Monk's Focus
Monk.description: Harness focus points to fuel Flurry of Blows, Patient Defense, and Step of the Wind.

Monk.name: Unarmored Movement
Monk.description: Movement speed increases by 10 feet while unarmored, scaling up to 30 feet at higher levels.

Monk.name: Uncanny Metabolism
Monk.description: When rolling initiative, regain all focus points and hit points equal to monk level plus a martial arts die roll.

Monk.name: Deflect Attacks
Monk.description: Reduce incoming bludgeoning, piercing, or slashing damage by 1d10 plus Dexterity modifier and monk level, optionally redirecting damage.

Monk.name: Monk Subclass
Monk.description: Choose a monastic tradition specialization, gaining subclass features at specified levels.

Monk.name: Ability Score Improvement
Monk.description: Gain an ability score improvement feat or another feat you qualify for. Repeats at levels 8, 12, and 16.

Monk.name: Slow Fall
Monk.description: Use a reaction to reduce fall damage by an amount equal to five times your monk level.

Monk.name: Extra Attack
Monk.description: Attack twice instead of once when taking the Attack action on your turn.

Monk.name: Stunning Strike
Monk.description: Expend a focus point when hitting to force a Constitution save, potentially stunning the target.

Monk.name: Empowered Strikes
Monk.description: Your unarmed strikes can deal force damage instead of their normal damage type.

Monk.name: Evasion
Monk.description: When making a Dexterity save for half damage, take no damage on success and half on failure.

Monk.name: Acrobatic Movement
Monk.description: Move along vertical surfaces and across liquids without falling while unarmored.

Monk.name: Heightened Focus
Monk.description: Flurry of Blows makes three strikes, Patient Defense grants temporary HP, and Step of the Wind moves willing creatures.

Monk.name: Self-Restoration
Monk.description: Remove charmed, frightened, or poisoned conditions at turn's end; forgoing food and drink doesn't cause exhaustion.

Monk.name: Deflect Energy
Monk.description: Deflect Attacks now works against any damage type, not just bludgeoning, piercing, or slashing.

Monk.name: Disciplined Survivor
Monk.description: Gain proficiency in all saving throws; expend a focus point to reroll a failed save.

Monk.name: Perfect Focus
Monk.description: When rolling initiative without Uncanny Metabolism, regain focus points up to 4 if you have 3 or fewer.

Monk.name: Superior Defense
Monk.description: Expend 3 focus points to gain resistance to all damage except force for 1 minute.

Monk.name: Epic Boon
Monk.description: Gain an Epic Boon feat or another feat you qualify for.

Monk.name: Body and Mind
Monk.description: Increase Dexterity and Wisdom scores by 4 each, to a maximum of 25.

Monk.name: Open Hand Technique
Monk.description: Warrior of the Open Hand: After hitting with Flurry of Blows, impose Addle, Push, or Topple effects on the target.

Monk.name: Wholeness of Body
Monk.description: Warrior of the Open Hand: As a bonus action, roll your martial arts die to regain HP plus your Wisdom modifier.

Monk.name: Fleet Step
Monk.description: Warrior of the Open Hand: After using a bonus action other than Step of the Wind, immediately use Step of the Wind.

Monk.name: Quivering Palm
Monk.description: Warrior of the Open Hand: Expend 4 focus points on an unarmed strike to set vibrations that later deal 10d12 force damage.

Paladin.name: Lay On Hands
Paladin.description: Pool of healing power equal to 5 times Paladin level, usable as bonus action to restore HP or remove Poisoned condition.

Paladin.name: Spellcasting
Paladin.description: Cast Paladin spells using Charisma, prepare spells from the Paladin spell list, and use Holy Symbol as focus.

Paladin.name: Weapon Mastery
Paladin.description: Gain mastery properties for two weapon types of your choice, switchable after each Long Rest.

Paladin.name: Fighting Style
Paladin.description: Choose a Fighting Style feat or Blessed Warrior to learn two Cleric cantrips with Charisma.

Paladin.name: Paladin's Smite
Paladin.description: Always have Divine Smite prepared and can cast it once without expending a spell slot per Long Rest.

Paladin.name: Channel Divinity
Paladin.description: Channel divine energy for magical effects like Divine Sense; gain two uses regaining on Short and Long Rest.

Paladin.name: Paladin Subclass
Paladin.description: Choose a subclass specialization that grants additional features at specified levels.

Paladin.name: Ability Score Improvement
Paladin.description: Gain an Ability Score Improvement feat or another feat. Repeats at levels 8, 12, and 16.

Paladin.name: Extra Attack
Paladin.description: Attack twice instead of once when taking the Attack action on your turn.

Paladin.name: Faithful Steed
Paladin.description: Always have Find Steed prepared and can cast it once without a spell slot per Long Rest.

Paladin.name: Aura of Protection
Paladin.description: Emanate a 10-foot aura granting you and allies bonus to saving throws equal to your Charisma modifier.

Paladin.name: Abjure Foes
Paladin.description: Expend Channel Divinity to frighten creatures equal to Charisma modifier within 60 feet.

Paladin.name: Aura of Courage
Paladin.description: You and allies gain immunity to Frightened while in your Aura of Protection.

Paladin.name: Radiant Strikes
Paladin.description: All melee weapon and unarmed strike attacks deal an extra 1d8 radiant damage.

Paladin.name: Restoring Touch
Paladin.description: When using Lay On Hands, expend 5 HP per condition to remove Blinded, Charmed, Deafened, Frightened, Paralyzed, or Stunned.

Paladin.name: Aura Expansion
Paladin.description: Your Aura of Protection expands from 10 feet to 30 feet.

Paladin.name: Epic Boon
Paladin.description: Gain an Epic Boon feat or another feat of your choice for which you qualify.

Paladin.name: Oath of Devotion Spells
Paladin.description: Oath of Devotion: Automatically prepare specific spells like Protection from Evil and Good and Shield of Faith.

Paladin.name: Sacred Weapon
Paladin.description: Oath of Devotion: Expend Channel Divinity to add Charisma modifier to attack rolls with one weapon for 10 minutes.

Paladin.name: Aura of Devotion
Paladin.description: Oath of Devotion: You and allies gain immunity to Charmed while in your Aura of Protection.

Paladin.name: Smite of Protection
Paladin.description: Oath of Devotion: When casting Divine Smite, you and allies gain half cover in your aura until your next turn.

Paladin.name: Holy Nimbus
Paladin.description: Oath of Devotion: Activate 10-minute aura granting advantage on saves against Fiends/Undead, radiant damage to enemies, and sunlight.

Ranger.name: Spellcasting
Ranger.description: Channel nature's magic to cast spells using Wisdom as your spellcasting ability.

Ranger.name: Favored Enemy
Ranger.description: Always have Hunter's Mark prepared and can cast it twice per long rest without expending spell slots.

Ranger.name: Weapon Mastery
Ranger.description: Gain mastery properties for two weapon types of your choice, changeable after each long rest.

Ranger.name: Deft Explorer
Ranger.description: Gain expertise in one skill proficiency and learn two additional languages.

Ranger.name: Fighting Style
Ranger.description: Choose a fighting style feat or learn two druid cantrips that count as ranger spells.

Ranger.name: Ranger Subclass
Ranger.description: Select a subclass specialization that provides features at certain ranger levels.

Ranger.name: Ability Score Improvement
Ranger.description: Gain the Ability Score Improvement feat or another qualifying feat. Repeats at levels 8, 12, and 16.

Ranger.name: Extra Attack
Ranger.description: Attack twice when taking the Attack action on your turn.

Ranger.name: Roving
Ranger.description: Gain 10 feet additional speed without heavy armor plus climb and swim speeds equal to your movement speed.

Ranger.name: Expertise
Ranger.description: Gain expertise in two additional skill proficiencies.

Ranger.name: Tireless
Ranger.description: Gain temporary hit points as a magic action and reduce exhaustion by 1 after each short rest.

Ranger.name: Relentless Hunter
Ranger.description: Taking damage cannot break your concentration on Hunter's Mark.

Ranger.name: Nature's Veil
Ranger.description: Use a bonus action to become invisible until the end of your next turn, usable Wisdom modifier times per long rest.

Ranger.name: Precise Hunter
Ranger.description: Gain advantage on attack rolls against creatures marked by your Hunter's Mark.

Ranger.name: Feral Senses
Ranger.description: Gain blindsight with a 30-foot range.

Ranger.name: Epic Boon
Ranger.description: Gain an Epic Boon feat or another qualifying feat of your choice.

Ranger.name: Foe Slayer
Ranger.description: Increase the damage die of your Hunter's Mark from d6 to d10.

Ranger.name: Hunter's Lore
Ranger.description: Hunter: Reveal immunities, resistances, and vulnerabilities of creatures marked by your Hunter's Mark.

Ranger.name: Hunter's Prey
Ranger.description: Hunter: Choose Colossus Slayer or Horde Breaker, switchable after short or long rests.

Ranger.name: Defensive Tactics
Ranger.description: Hunter: Choose Escape the Horde or Multiattack Defense, switchable after short or long rests.

Ranger.name: Superior Hunter's Prey
Ranger.description: Hunter: Once per turn, apply Hunter's Mark extra damage to another creature within 30 feet of your marked target.

Ranger.name: Superior Hunter's Defense
Ranger.description: Hunter: Use a reaction to gain resistance to damage taken until the end of your current turn.

Rogue.name: Expertise
Rogue.description: Gain expertise in two skill proficiencies of your choice, and two more at level 6.

Rogue.name: Sneak Attack
Rogue.description: Deal extra damage (1d6 to 10d6) once per turn with finesse or ranged weapons when you have advantage or an ally is near the target.

Rogue.name: Thieves' Cant
Rogue.description: You know the secret Thieves' Cant language and one additional language of your choice.

Rogue.name: Weapon Mastery
Rogue.description: Use the mastery properties of two weapon types you're proficient with, changeable after each long rest.

Rogue.name: Cunning Action
Rogue.description: Take Dash, Disengage, or Hide as a bonus action on your turn.

Rogue.name: Rogue Subclass
Rogue.description: Choose a subclass specialization that grants features at specific levels.

Rogue.name: Steady Aim
Rogue.description: Gain advantage on your next attack as a bonus action, but your speed becomes 0 until turn end.

Rogue.name: Ability Score Improvement
Rogue.description: Gain a feat or ability score improvement at levels 4, 8, 10, 12, and 16.

Rogue.name: Cunning Strike
Rogue.description: When dealing sneak attack damage, spend damage dice to add effects like Poison, Trip, or Withdraw.

Rogue.name: Uncanny Dodge
Rogue.description: Use a reaction to halve damage from an attack you can see.

Rogue.name: Evasion
Rogue.description: Take no damage on successful Dexterity saves against effects that normally deal half damage.

Rogue.name: Reliable Talent
Rogue.description: Treat d20 rolls of 9 or lower as 10 for ability checks using your skill or tool proficiencies.

Rogue.name: Improved Cunning Strike
Rogue.description: Apply up to two cunning strike effects when dealing sneak attack damage.

Rogue.name: Devious Strikes
Rogue.description: Unlock three new cunning strike options: Daze, Knock Out, and Obscure with escalating die costs.

Rogue.name: Slippery Mind
Rogue.description: Gain proficiency in Wisdom and Charisma saving throws.

Rogue.name: Elusive
Rogue.description: Attack rolls against you can't have advantage unless you're incapacitated.

Rogue.name: Epic Boon
Rogue.description: Gain an epic boon feat or another feat you qualify for.

Rogue.name: Stroke of Luck
Rogue.description: Convert one failed d20 test into a natural 20 per short or long rest.

Rogue.name: Fast Hands
Rogue.description: Thief: Use a bonus action to make sleight of hand checks or utilize/activate magic items.

Rogue.name: Second-Story Work
Rogue.description: Thief: Gain climb speed equal to your movement speed and determine jumps using Dexterity.

Rogue.name: Supreme Sneak
Rogue.description: Thief: Add Stealth Attack cunning strike option to remain hidden after attacking if behind cover.

Rogue.name: Use Magic Device
Rogue.description: Thief: Attune to four items, reroll magic item charges on 6, and cast spell scrolls using Intelligence.

Rogue.name: Thief's Reflexes
Rogue.description: Thief: Take two turns in the first round of combat at normal initiative and initiative minus 10.

Sorcerer.name: Spellcasting
Sorcerer.description: Cast spells using Charisma as your spellcasting ability. Know 4 cantrips and prepare spells based on your Sorcerer level.

Sorcerer.name: Innate Sorcery
Sorcerer.description: As a bonus action, gain +1 spell save DC and advantage on spell attack rolls for 1 minute. Two uses per long rest.

Sorcerer.name: Font of Magic
Sorcerer.description: Gain Sorcery Points equal to your Sorcerer level that can be converted from or into spell slots.

Sorcerer.name: Metamagic
Sorcerer.description: Choose two Metamagic options to modify spells by spending Sorcery Points. Gain more options at levels 10 and 17.

Sorcerer.name: Sorcerer Subclass
Sorcerer.description: Select a specialization like Draconic Sorcery that grants unique features at specific levels.

Sorcerer.name: Ability Score Improvement
Sorcerer.description: Gain an Ability Score Improvement feat or another feat. Repeats at levels 8, 12, and 16.

Sorcerer.name: Sorcerous Restoration
Sorcerer.description: During a short rest, regain Sorcery Points up to half your Sorcerer level. Usable once per long rest.

Sorcerer.name: Sorcery Incarnate
Sorcerer.description: Spend 2 Sorcery Points to activate Innate Sorcery if no uses remain. While active, apply two Metamagic options per spell.

Sorcerer.name: Epic Boon
Sorcerer.description: Gain an Epic Boon feat or another feat of your choice for which you qualify.

Sorcerer.name: Arcane Apotheosis
Sorcerer.description: While Innate Sorcery is active, use one Metamagic option per turn without spending Sorcery Points.

Sorcerer.name: Draconic Resilience
Sorcerer.description: Draconic Sorcery: Increase max HP by 3 plus 1 per level. Gain dragon scales setting AC to 10 + Dexterity + Charisma when unarmored.

Sorcerer.name: Draconic Spells
Sorcerer.description: Draconic Sorcery: Always have certain spells prepared based on Sorcerer level, including Chromatic Orb and Dragon's Breath.

Sorcerer.name: Elemental Affinity
Sorcerer.description: Draconic Sorcery: Gain resistance to a dragon-associated damage type and add Charisma modifier to one damage roll of matching spells.

Sorcerer.name: Dragon Wings
Sorcerer.description: Draconic Sorcery: Manifest draconic wings as a bonus action for 1 hour granting 60-foot fly speed.

Sorcerer.name: Dragon Companion
Sorcerer.description: Draconic Sorcery: Cast Summon Dragon without a material component once per long rest, optionally without concentration for 1 minute.

Warlock.name: Eldritch Invocations
Warlock.description: Gain invocations providing forbidden knowledge that grants magical abilities, replaceable when leveling up.

Warlock.name: Pact Magic
Warlock.description: Cast spells using Charisma through a pact with a mysterious entity. Spell slots refresh on short or long rests.

Warlock.name: Magical Cunning
Warlock.description: Perform a 1-minute ritual to regain expended spell slots up to half your maximum, usable once per long rest.

Warlock.name: Warlock Subclass
Warlock.description: Choose a subclass specialization granting additional features at certain levels.

Warlock.name: Ability Score Improvement
Warlock.description: Gain an Ability Score Improvement feat or another feat. Repeats at levels 8, 12, and 16.

Warlock.name: Contact Patron
Warlock.description: Always have Contact Other Plane prepared; cast it without a slot and automatically succeed on its save, once per long rest.

Warlock.name: Mystic Arcanum
Warlock.description: Gain access to level 6-9 spells that can be cast once per long rest without expending spell slots.

Warlock.name: Epic Boon
Warlock.description: Gain an Epic Boon feat or another feat of your choice for which you qualify.

Warlock.name: Eldritch Master
Warlock.description: When using Magical Cunning, regain all expended Pact Magic spell slots instead of just half.

Warlock.name: Dark One's Blessing
Warlock.description: Fiend Patron: Gain temporary HP equal to Charisma modifier plus Warlock level when you or an ally reduces an enemy to 0 HP nearby.

Warlock.name: Fiend Spells
Warlock.description: Fiend Patron: Always have specific spells prepared based on your Warlock level.

Warlock.name: Dark One's Own Luck
Warlock.description: Fiend Patron: Add 1d10 to ability checks or saving throws, usable Charisma modifier times per long rest.

Warlock.name: Fiendish Resilience
Warlock.description: Fiend Patron: Choose a damage type each rest to gain resistance to until you choose a different one.

Warlock.name: Hurl Through Hell
Warlock.description: Fiend Patron: When hitting with an attack, force target through a nightmare landscape dealing psychic damage and incapacitating it.

Wizard.name: Spellcasting
Wizard.description: Cast Wizard spells using Intelligence as your spellcasting ability, with cantrips, a spellbook, and prepared spells.

Wizard.name: Ritual Adept
Wizard.description: Cast any Ritual-tagged spell from your spellbook without preparing it, reading from the book during casting.

Wizard.name: Arcane Recovery
Wizard.description: During a Short Rest, recover spell slots with combined level up to half your Wizard level, no slot exceeding level 5.

Wizard.name: Scholar
Wizard.description: Gain Expertise in one skill from Arcana, History, Investigation, Medicine, Nature, or Religion.

Wizard.name: Wizard Subclass
Wizard.description: Choose a specialization granting features at certain Wizard levels throughout your career.

Wizard.name: Ability Score Improvement
Wizard.description: Gain a feat or ability score increase. Repeats at levels 8, 12, and 16.

Wizard.name: Memorize Spell
Wizard.description: After a Short Rest, swap one prepared spell for another from your spellbook of appropriate level.

Wizard.name: Spell Mastery
Wizard.description: Select one level 1 and one level 2 spell to cast at will without slots.

Wizard.name: Epic Boon
Wizard.description: Gain an Epic Boon feat or another feat of your choice for which you qualify.

Wizard.name: Signature Spells
Wizard.description: Choose two level 3 spells to cast once each at level 3 without slots per Short or Long Rest.

Wizard.name: Evocation Savant
Wizard.description: Evoker: Add two Evocation spells to your spellbook free, plus one new Evocation spell when gaining spell slot access.

Wizard.name: Potent Cantrip
Wizard.description: Evoker: Cantrips deal half damage on missed attacks or failed saves, even when damage is normally negated.

Wizard.name: Sculpt Spells
Wizard.description: Evoker: Designate creatures equal to 1 plus spell level to automatically succeed on saves and take no damage from your Evocation spells.

Wizard.name: Empowered Evocation
Wizard.description: Evoker: Add your Intelligence modifier to one damage roll when casting an Evocation school spell.

Wizard.name: Overchannel
Wizard.description: Evoker: Deal maximum damage with a level 1-5 Wizard spell; repeat uses before a Long Rest cause increasing Necrotic damage to yourself.
